title: Down Payment Assistance Explainer — Marion County
audience: Marion County first-time homebuyers with household income under $80k
goal: Visit first-keys-indy.vercel.app to see if they may qualify
hook: Did you know Marion County has programs that may help you buy your first home?

scenes.headline: Marion County has programs that may help you buy your first home.
scenes.caption_text: Marion County has homebuyer assistance programs.

scenes.headline: The #1 barrier to homeownership: the down payment.
scenes.body: Most first-time buyers don't know help is available.
scenes.caption_text: The down payment stops most people. But it doesn't have to.

scenes.headline: Down Payment Assistance programs may reduce what you pay upfront.
scenes.body: Eligible buyers in Marion County may qualify for assistance.
scenes.caption_text: DPA programs may reduce your upfront costs.

scenes.headline: Who may qualify?
scenes.body: First-time buyers. Marion County residents. Income guidelines apply.
scenes.caption_text: Income guidelines and eligibility requirements apply.

scenes.headline: Important: Approval is not guaranteed.
scenes.body: Eligibility depends on your situation. Always work with a HUD-approved lender.
scenes.caption_text: Results vary. Work with a HUD-approved lender.

scenes.headline: See if you may qualify today.

voiceover_script: Did you know Marion County has programs that may help you buy your first home? The number one barrier to homeownership is the down payment — and most first-time buyers don't even know help is available. Down Payment Assistance programs may reduce what you pay upfront. Eligible buyers in Marion County — who meet income guidelines — may qualify for assistance. Approval is not guaranteed. Results depend on your individual situation. Always work with a HUD-approved lender. Visit first-keys-indy dot vercel dot app to see if you may qualify.
music_direction: Warm, hopeful, community-centered instrumental — not too fast
thumbnail_concept: Front door of a home with keys in lock. Text overlay: 'You May Qualify.' Green brand accent.

issues: No specific dollar amounts claimed — compliant
